title: USGS Coastal Change Hazards
description: A USGS source card about coasts, storms, erosion, sea-level change, and coastal resilience.
authors: USGS Coastal and Marine Hazards and Resources Program
license: Public Domain / some linked media may vary

pages.text: USGS coastal change resources explain erosion, storm impacts, shoreline movement, sea-level context, coastal maps, and science for community planning.
Use this source for place-based reading about how natural processes and human decisions shape coastlines.
USGS materials are generally public domain as U.S. government work, but some linked media may have separate credit or rights requirements. Check item-level rights.
